title: Crumble Topped Lemon Bars
description: A tangy lemon filling on a bed of crumbly oat mixture, topped with a crunchy crumble.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Line an 8-inch square baking pan with parchment paper.
Prepare the crumbly oat mixture by mixing together flour, granulated sugar, and confectioners' sugar.
Press the oat mixture evenly into the prepared baking pan.
Bake for 20-22 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
While the crust is baking, prepare the lemon filling by whisking together eggs, lemon juice, and lemon zest.
Pour the lemon filling over the baked crust.
Return the pan to the oven and bake for an additional 18-20 minutes, or until the filling is set.
Prepare the crumble topping by mixing together crumbly oat mixture and crumble topping.
Sprinkle the crumble topping evenly over the lemon filling.
Bake for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely before slicing and serving.
